---
title: "Claude Code"
description: "Anthropic's coding agent with native Bedrock support."
---

<Note>
**Stable pack.** Claude Code is Anthropic's official CLI coding agent. The pack configures it to use Bedrock via the instance's IAM role — no API key management.
</Note>

## When to use

- Want **Claude Code** exactly as Anthropic ships it, running on Bedrock
- Want the agent to auto-update (Anthropic releases frequently)
- Need tight Claude integration with an existing Bedrock account
- One-shot or interactive use; no long-running service

## What the pack installs

- Claude Code CLI (via Anthropic's installer)
- Bedrock-mode env vars: `ANTHROPIC_MODEL`, `ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL`, Bedrock region, etc.
- Shell profile that adds `claude` to PATH and sets auto-update behavior
- Health check: `claude --version`

No systemd service — this is a pure CLI pack. You invoke `claude` directly when you SSM in.

## Install — non-interactive

<Tabs>
  <Tab title="Builder (recommended)">
    ```bash
    curl -sfL install.lowkey.run | bash -s -- -y \
      --pack claude-code \
      --profile builder
    ```
  </Tab>
  <Tab title="Account assistant">
    ```bash
    curl -sfL install.lowkey.run | bash -s -- -y \
      --pack claude-code \
      --profile account_assistant
    ```
  </Tab>
  <Tab title="Personal assistant">
    ```bash
    curl -sfL install.lowkey.run | bash -s -- -y \
      --pack claude-code \
      --profile personal_assistant
    ```
  </Tab>
</Tabs>

## Pack parameters

| Param | Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `region` | `--region` | `us-east-1` | AWS region for Bedrock |
| `model` | `--model` | `us.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6` | Main Bedrock model (`ANTHROPIC_MODEL`) |
| `haiku-model` | *(pack-only)* | `us.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0` | Fast-path model (`ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL`) |

The `--model` flag is threaded end-to-end through CFN → bootstrap.sh → pack. The haiku override is set in the manifest and can be changed by editing the pack and running manually.

## Resource requirements

| | Builder | Assistant profiles |
|---|---|---|
| Instance | `t4g.xlarge` | `t4g.large` (claude-code's pack default) |
| Root volume | 40 GB | 40 GB |
| Data volume | 0 GB | 0 GB |

Claude Code is stateless on disk — the data volume isn't needed.

## First-run (post-install)

```bash
aws ssm start-session --target <instance-id>

claude --version
claude "explain this repo" /home/ec2-user/your-repo
```

No login needed — Bedrock auth is via the instance's IAM role.

## Advanced: custom Bedrock models

If your Bedrock account has a different model ID (e.g. a provisioned-throughput ARN), override in advanced mode or edit pack config:

```bash
curl -sfL install.lowkey.run | bash -s -- -y \
  --pack claude-code \
  --profile builder \
  --advanced
# Then pick custom model in the prompt.
```

## Tear-down

Delete the stack. No lingering state to clean up.
